title: cymation undulatum
intro: Cymation undulatum, also known as the rattlesnake plantain, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its wavy or undulating leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cymation undulatum include treating snake bites, reducing swelling, and alleviating pain, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and skin irritations. Cymation undulatum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
